import axios from"axios";import{useState}from"react";import"./Login.css";// 👈 make sure this file exists
import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Login(){const[email,setEmail]=useState("");const[password,setPassword]=useState("");const handleLogin=async()=>{console.log("Sending:",email,password);try{const res=await axios.post("http://localhost/kawasaki-api/login.php",{email:email,password:password},{headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}});console.log("Response:",res.data);if(res.data.status==="success"){alert("Login Success ✅");localStorage.setItem("admin","true");window.location.href="/admin/dashboard";}else{alert(res.data.message);}}catch(err){console.error(err);alert("Server error ❌");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"login-container",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Admin Login"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",placeholder:"Email",className:"login-input",value:email,onChange:e=>setEmail(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"Password",className:"login-input",value:password,onChange:e=>setPassword(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"login-btn",onClick:handleLogin,children:"Login"})]});}
